nodes.label: sanad-today-focus.png
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Sanad legal app's Today/Daily Focus view (اليوم). Shows a personalized greeting, a prioritized task list for the day (أولويات اليوم), and a prominent 'Start Focus' (ابدأ تركيزً) CTA button. Right sidebar displays full navigation including Dashboard, Clients, Cases, Communications, Documents, Invoices, Compliance (4 badge), Tasks (9 badge), Deep Work, and Calendar. Role switcher in top bar toggles between Lawyer (محامي) and Student (طالب) modes. Bottom bar confirms PWA installation, ⌘K quick search, and home-server caching.

properties.subtitle: لوحة العمليات اليومية للمحامين والمنشآت الصغيرة في السعودية
priority_items: متابعة توقيع اتفاقية السرية (Follow up on NDA signing — sent 5 days ago)
تحديث العميل بشأن صيديليات الخليج (Update client re Gulf Pharmacies — email status & revised timeline)
تحديث العميل بشأن صيديليات الخليج (duplicate task item visible)

nodes.label: Today / Daily Focus View
nodes.description: The 'اليوم' (Today) view — a daily briefing screen that surfaces the lawyer's top priorities for the day with a 'Start Focus' button to enter a focused work mode. Acts as the app's daily entry point.

nodes.label: Daily Priorities Feature (أولويات اليوم)
nodes.description: AI- or rule-generated ranked list of the lawyer's most important tasks for the current day. Each item shows a title and contextual sub-note (e.g., days since NDA was sent, what action to take). Displayed in the Today view.

nodes.label: Role Switcher (Lawyer / Student)
nodes.description: Top-bar toggle allowing the user to switch between Lawyer (محامي) and Student (طالب) modes, changing the available navigation and features.

nodes.label: Navigation Sidebar
nodes.description: Right-side vertical navigation panel with icon+label items: Today, Dashboard, Clients, Cases Board, Communications, Documents, Invoices, Compliance (badge:4), Tasks (badge:9), Deep Work, Calendar.

nodes.label: PWA Support
nodes.description: Sanad is installed and functional as a Progressive Web App with home-server caching. Bottom status bar confirms 'PWA مفعل' and 'محضن للخادم المنزلي'.

nodes.label: DeepWorkView.tsx
nodes.description: React component likely responsible for the Deep Work view accessible from the sidebar. Distinct from the Today view but linked via the 'Start Focus' CTA.

nodes.label: DashboardView.tsx
nodes.description: React component for the Dashboard (لوحة التحكم) view, accessible from the navigation sidebar.
